title: Old Infuse Rework
description: Old Infuse Rework: is a PvP-based progression plugin where players start with no effects and gain positive effects by killing others, while dying without power grants negative effects. the only way to grow stronger or remove weaknesses is through combat.
body:
🔥 Old Infuse Reworked 🔥
A Kill-Based Effect Progression SMP Plugin

Old Infuse Reworked is the original Infuse SMP system built around one brutal idea:

Your strength is earned through combat — and lost through failure.

No grinding.
No commands needed for progression.
Just kills, deaths, and consequences.

⚔ Core Gameplay

• When a player joins the server, they start with no effects.
• Effects are gained or lost only through PvP.
• Milk does NOT clear any effects.
• Effects persist until changed by combat or OP commands.
• Added Custom Potion craftable that gives positives and removes negatives for more info check change logs!!!

🗡 When You Kill a Player

• If you have no effects → You gain a positive effect.
• If you have a negative effect → The negative effect is removed.
• Kills are the only way to naturally grow stronger.

Winning makes you stronger.

💀 When You Die

• If you die while having no effects → You gain a negative effect.
• Death always has consequences.
• Falling behind makes survival harder.

Lose without power, and you suffer.

🔄 Redemption System

• Kill someone while you have a negative effect → You lose the negative effect.
• Combat is your only way back to strength.

There are no easy resets.

🛠 Admin Commands (OP Only)

• /infuse add <player>

Removes negative effects

Grants positive effects

• /infuse remove <player>

Removes positive effects

Applies negative effects

Only operators can use these commands.

🧪 Important Rules

• Milk does NOT remove effects.
• Effects cannot be cleared normally.
• Only kills, deaths, or OP commands change infusion state.

Join my discord server for plugin updates paid plugins free plugins and plugin related stuff!!:

https://discord.gg/RfXUTxpPht
